caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering, and a gold chain. He wears headphones and sits before a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. On the wall behind him, a banner repeats the text "UNION MUSTLE" vertically alongside gold stars. A blue sign above him reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". To his right, a black mug with red and white text that includes "TALK OUT" is visible on the table. A small logo with a microphone icon and the word "TALK" is overlaid in the bottom-left corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking into the microphone while looking slightly to his left, with very little movement across the frames.
